official_functions.role: Construct the official Login serverbound login_acknowledged singleton fixture
Write the official Login serverbound login_acknowledged body
Write the full Login serverbound framed login_acknowledged packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login serverbound framed login_acknowledged packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login serverbound state
Identify official singleton, terminal, and unit-codec shape

invariants: The official Login serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the login_acknowledged body.
The official Login serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundLoginAcknowledgedPacket.
The official login_acknowledged fixture is the ServerboundLoginAcknowledgedPacket singleton.
The official login_acknowledged packet is terminal.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, terminal flag, singleton equality, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove Configuration entry, state transition handling, cookie_response support, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer Configuration entry, state transition handling, cookie_response support, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
